title: Earthy Sweet Filipino Kinako Bake
description: A unique Filipino dish featuring kinako, with an earthy and sweet flavor profile, perfect for a brunch mood, and friendly to those who avoid onion and garlic.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large mixing bowl, whisk together kinako, sugar, and agrar agar powder.
In a separate bowl, whisk together milk, eggs, melted butter, and vanilla extract.
Add the wet ingredients to the dry ingredients and mix until well combined.
Pour the mixture into a 9x9 inch baking dish.
Bake for 35 minutes or until the edges are set and the center is slightly jiggly.
Remove from the oven and let cool to room temperature.
Refrigerate for at least 2 hours to allow the mixture to set completely.
Cut into squares and serve chilled.
